title: Grob's Cobblemon Pack
description: Grob's custom pack built around the Cobblemon mod and it's supporting mods/addons.
body:
Grob's Cobblemon Pack is a 1.21.1 custom modpack designed around the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/project/MdwFAVRL) mod and the [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/project/lRwTUnD7) mod for use in smaller SMP style multiplayer servers. This modpack is a great choice if you are looking for an adventure that slows progression. This modpack requires players to choose a Radical Cobblemon Trainers quest series to battle key trainers to raise their pokemon's level cap. This prevents players from spamming pokeballs to catch high level pokemon and cheesing the game. It requires players to craft/build teams around different level caps to fight difficult trainers.

There are building/decoration mods ([Rechiseled](https://modrinth.com/project/B0g2vT6l)/[Macaw's Fences and Walls](https://modrinth.com/project/GmwLse2I)) to provide over 600+ new blocks to use for building custom towns and gyms for your SMP server. Cobblemon datapacks and supporting mods provide incentive to explore the world. The [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/project/LOpKHB2A) mod allows quick and easy transport between villages and key structures and biomes. [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/project/ItmVb4zY) is a fun way to raise/hunt for the perfect pokemon for battling with Radical Cobblemon Trainers.
